name: Partial Charitable Deduction for Quid Pro Quo Contributions

eligibility.description: Applies when a taxpayer makes a payment to a 501(c)(3) organization exceeding $75 and receives a benefit (like a dinner or tickets) in return.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Taxpayers can deduct the portion of a payment to a charitable organization that exceeds the fair market value of goods or services received in return.
